response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of software development experience, including recent hands-on work with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. A strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and end-to-end product delivery across multiple companies fit the role well. Gaps are mostly secondary: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Jest/Playwright experience listed, and some depth is concentrated in DLang, which is not part of the target stack.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience with cloud (AWS CDK) and Kubernetes/Docker exposure
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generation work, matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience; Java exposure appears limited and dated
Listed testing tools do not explicitly include Vitest, Jest, or Playwright despite general testing expertise
Significant portion of recent deep expertise is in DLang, outside the role's stack
